title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Look at the question and the ideas around it. Discuss each idea with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two are the most important.

content.centralQuestion: How can public health and wellbeing systems be improved?
content.decisionTask: Now decide which two improvements would have the greatest impact on public health.

script.text: I'd like you to look at this question and these ideas, and talk together about how public health systems could be improved.
Now you have about a minute to decide which two improvements would have the greatest impact.
